LibraryThumbnailSelector.selectBook: Select a book from the series
LibraryThumbnailSelector.selectSeries: Select a series from the library
LibraryThumbnailSelector.label: Select thumbnail
LibraryThumbnailSelector.labelDescription: Choose a different thumbnail for this library, either from a book or upload a custom one

ProcessLibraryThumbnails.label: Process thumbnail colors
ProcessLibraryThumbnails.description: Extract missing thumbnail color metadata or force the regeneration of it for all thumbnails

RegenerateThumbnails.label: Regenerate thumbnails
RegenerateThumbnails.description: Either generate missing thumbnails or force the recreation of all thumbnails

rebuildMetadata.label: Rebuild metadata
rebuildMetadata.description: Rebuild metadata for all books in the library

rebuildHashes.label: Rebuild hashes
rebuildHashes.description: Rebuild hashes for all books in the library

SeriesThumbnailSelector.choosePage: Choose a page from this book to use as the new thumbnail
SeriesThumbnailSelector.selectBook: Select a book from the series

DeleteAPIKeyConfirmModal.title: Delete API key
DeleteAPIKeyConfirmModal.description: Anything using this key will immediately lose authentication

DebugSettings.heading: Debug settings
DebugSettings.description: These won't exist in production, but are useful for debugging

PreferColorToggle.label: Prefer colors
PreferColorToggle.description: Display more of the main accent color instead of monochrome colors
PreferColorToggle.title: This setting is not currently supported

DeleteDeviceConfirmation.title: Delete device
DeleteDeviceConfirmation.description: Are you sure you want to delete this device?

JobActionMenu.invalidStateTitle: This job was found in an invalid state
JobActionMenu.invalidStateDescription: Please check server logs and report this issue

JobDataInspector.title: Job data
JobDataInspector.description: The final output of the job after it had completed

MaxSessionsAllowed.label: Max sessions allowed
MaxSessionsAllowed.description: The maximum number of valid sessions allowed at a time. If a user tries to log in once this limit is reached, the oldest session will be invalidated.

CreateOrUpdateUserForm.accountDetailsDescription: They can change these values at any time

LoginActivitySection.heading: Authentication history
LoginActivitySection.description: All login attempts are logged and stored for security purposes

InspectUserSlideOver.title: Inspect user
InspectUserSlideOver.description: Inspect a user's information and configuration

UserActionMenu.lockError: An error occurred while locking the user
UserActionMenu.deleteSessionsError: An error occurred while deleting user sessions

UserTableSection.heading: Existing accounts
UserTableSection.description: A list of all existing accounts on the server

DeleteUserModal.title: Delete User Account
DeleteUserModal.description: Are you sure you want to delete this user? If you select the hard delete option, this user and all of their data will be permanently deleted.

UserTable.sessionsTooltip: The number of non-expired login sessions for this user

TableColumnsBottomDrawer.selectAtLeastOne: You must select at least one column
TableColumnsBottomDrawer.title: Table configuration
TableColumnsBottomDrawer.subtitle: Choose which columns to display or hide
TableColumnsBottomDrawer.groupColumnsDescription: This only affects the parent table by which books are grouped
TableColumnsBottomDrawer.bookColumnsDescription: This only affects the nested book table(s)
TableColumnsBottomDrawer.enableMultiSortDescription: Sorting by a column removes the previous sort. This setting allows combining them, instead

FilterBottomDrawer.notImplemented: This functionality is not yet implemented

UserSmartListsScene.heading: Smart lists
UserSmartListsScene.subtitle: Your favorite searches and filters saved for easy access
